---
title: "M^c^Cool People: Sol"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

McCool FM - Interview Transcript <br>
Maggie McCool-Sol, 21st January 1990, 11.00 a.m.

__Maggie M^c^Cool:__
You’re listening to McCool FM and I’m your host Maggie McCool. 
Today we have a very special guest, Sol, the sole survivor of the Laser-US space station. 
They’re a devout Sun of Nyxmera and they are touring their new book “Sol the Ablated”. 
Welcome Sol.

__S:__ 
Happy to be here Maggie McCool.

__MM:__
Now Sol we all know that Nyxmera called down the asteroid that killed the dinosaurs because it was bored. 
As a Sun of Nyxmera myself, I was wondering why you helped create a method to stop these asteroids if they are the will of Nyxmera.

__S:__ 
Quite simply to entertain Nyxmera. 
If Nyxmera really wants us gone it can call down thousands of asteroids until one clears us off the face of the earth. 
Nyxmera could stop containing Tartarus and let it engulf us in lava. 
There are so many ways to exterminate us. 
I don’t pretend to understand its intentions but I think it is safe to say we are entertaining Nyxmera through our struggles. 
It is not done with us yet and we should be grateful.

__MM:__ 
Well you have convinced me! 
As you allude to, many like to personify the Primeval deities when they are anything but human. 
Next I believe you are going to read an excerpt from your book Sol.

__S:__ 
Yes, thank you. 
I will begin. 
As the most interesting and exciting person I know…

[end of excerpt]

Talks about how heat is an issue and capacitors are not good enough to output enough electricity for an ablation laser.
THey did not like how the military was looking into their technology.

Make Maggie ask why they are wearing sun glasses in door.
He'll answer he's functionally blind now due to laser damage.

Also make Sol distracted at one point (because he is watching through the eyes of of one his SOLs)
